assertions.title: Clear Credentials modal renders destructive copy + dual CTAs

steps.action: Verify identity/subtitle and destructive body copy
steps.expected: Subtitle and full destructive warning text match contract
steps.observed: Subtitle "My Signing Key · Share #0 · Igloo Web" and destructive copy including "This action cannot be undone." are present
Both CTAs are visible with expected labels

assertions.title: Export Profile modal renders password form + actions

steps.action: Verify scope line and form fields
steps.expected: Scope metadata and Export Password/Confirm Password fields appear
steps.observed: Scope line and both labeled password fields are present
Both CTAs render with expected labels

assertions.title: Export Complete modal renders Backup Ready + copy/download + Done

steps.expected: Copy/Download actions, warning text, and Done button are present
steps.observed: Copy + Download controls, warning sentence, and Done CTA are present

assertions.title: Signer Policy Prompt modal renders request meta + decision CTAs

steps.expected: Signer Policy modal and lead text are visible
steps.observed: Title "Signer Policy" and lead "A peer is requesting permission to sign on your behalf" are present

steps.expected: SIGN/EVENT KIND/CONTENT/PUBKEY/DOMAIN rows and Expires in 42s are present
steps.observed: All required labels and "Expires in 42s" are visible

steps.expected: Deny/Allow once/Always allow plus scoped allow/deny options are visible
steps.observed: All required top-level and scoped CTAs are present

assertions.title: Signing Failed modal renders error detail + Dismiss/Retry

steps.observed: Title "Signing Failed" appears with expected summary text

steps.expected: Detailed round/peer/error string and Dismiss/Retry buttons are present
steps.observed: Full detail string plus Dismiss and Retry CTAs are visible
Pending Approvals panel rendered with Open actions
Signer Policy modal opened with matching policy-prompt content

evidence.network: GET /demo/dashboard-running (document); no API/XHR requests observed during modal open

steps.observed: Dismiss removed modal overlay; only running dashboard controls remained in interactive snapshot

steps.expected: Modal closes and user returns to running dashboard state
steps.observed: Retry removed modal overlay and returned to running dashboard surface (no persistent modal controls visible)

evidence.network: GET /demo/dashboard-signing-failed (document); no API/XHR requests observed during Dismiss/Retry actions
